description.zh-cn: 商品批量导入导出：一键导出商品/SKU 的价格、库存、上下架等为 CSV；按 SKU 编码批量回填更新价格与库存(可选上下架)，适合批量改价、补货与盘点，导入前预校验并返回更新/跳过明细。
description.en: Bulk product import/export: export product/SKU price, stock and status to CSV; bulk-update price and stock (and optional active) by SKU code — ideal for repricing, restocking and stocktaking, with a pre-check summary of updated/skipped rows.
